projects.name: Lock Type 03 — Altitude North (LOG400 Full Build)
projects.summary: Build Lock 03 (Altitude North) from scratch at LOG400 in Rhino 'interior' (port 9003). 2 phases: spec roundtable (adds missing roof) + full build executor. ~2 sessions.

projects.name: Lock Type 02 — Cargo Lock LOG400
projects.summary: Upgrade Lock 02 Cargo from LOG200 base to LOG400 with complete roof system. 3 phases: Design → Review → Execute in Rhino port 9002.

projects.name: Knowledge Base Expansion (rhinobase + iboisbase)
projects.summary: Build rhinobase (RhinoCommon fluency) + iboisbase (IBOIS timber craft). 4 phases, 8 agents max, ~4 hrs.

projects.name: Knowledge Feedback Loop (medical guidelines model)
projects.summary: Add case_notes tables to bases, wire /rhino-review to write there. ~1.5 hrs + piggyback on modeling sessions.

projects.name: Lock 05 Visibility Lock — v2 Full Rebuild
projects.summary: Full rebuild of Lock 05 with discussion-first agent team coordination. v1 had 361 elements but too many incoherences. v2: discuss → agree → build once → verify. 3 phases, 1 session.

projects.name: Lock Type 08 — Altitude South (LOG400 Full Build)
projects.summary: Lock 08 Altitude South built at LOG400 in Rhino port 9002. 419 objects across 8 layers. Roundtable review applied 27 corrections (structural, envelope, fire safety). Full agent team build with health checks.

projects.name: Fabrication Bridge — Supply Chain + Ecological Impact
projects.summary: Connect design → sourcing → transport → fabrication → assembly → verification as a traceable, ecologically quantified chain. Roundwood as material passport. Per-lock supply chain comparison.
